markdown:
#  Which filters can I apply to the Change Events tool? 
##  Answer 
Filters allow you to view a subset of your data. In the Change Events tool, the filter options that you can apply are dependent upon the tab that you are viewing. The illustration below shows you the options in the Detail tab. However, each tab in this tool has different filter options.
![Change Event Detail Filters](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/6df81abefa5bf7f13fb6dd136296d973/e77b048940859df58374191f2e3f815d/change-event-detail-filters.png?fm=webp)
The table below details the filter options for each tab in the project's Change Events tool.  
| Change Event Number  | ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12)  |   | ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12)  |   |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| Change Reason  | ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12)  |   |   |   |  
| Commitment Cost  | ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12)  |   |   |   |  
| Contracting Company  |   |   | ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12)  |   |  
| Cost Code  | ![Icon Permissions Access Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/35af6c3878b6d54f67790e6b6491ebf1/713f0933defa9db9317328e2578e5bde/icon-permissions-access-check.png?fm=webp&h=12)  |   |   |   |

description: Summarizes the filters that are available in the project's Change Events tool.
